speaker: Dirtus
text: THANK YOU. Slide three is the offerings list.

speaker: Dirtus
text: Every summoning ritual requires offerings. I've cross-referenced Scatha's known drops from Hypixel Skyblock to determine what he values.

speaker: Mawla
text: The things that drop when you kill him in a video game.

speaker: Dirtus
text: The things that represent his essence, yes. So: enchanted string. Dragon fragments — we might have to substitute there, I haven't sourced those yet. Worm bait, obviously—

speaker: Grubwin
text: You want to bring worm bait into the school building.

speaker: Dirtus
text: I will say a blessing over it first.

speaker: Mawla
text: Where does one even buy worm bait in this city?

speaker: Dirtus
text: I know a guy. He runs a fishing supply shop two streets over. He was very understanding about the ceremonial context. Mostly.
You look at Grubwin. Grubwin looks at you. You have known this boy for approximately fifteen minutes and you already feel a deep, wordless bond with him.
